mapper.select:
select u.id, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, u.sex, u.introduction, u.status, u.violation_count as violationCount, u.invite_code as inviteCode, u.delete_flag as deleteFlag, u.create_time as createTime, max_role.role_name as roleName, max_role.role_code as roleCode, max_role.level as roleLevel, IFNULL(a.points, 0) as points from osh_user u left join ( select ur.user_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.level, r.id as role_id from osh_user_role ur join osh_role r on r.id = ur.role_id and r.delete_flag = 0 where ur.delete_flag = 0 and (ur.user_id, r.level) in ( select ur2.user_id, max(r2.level) from osh_user_role ur2 join osh_role r2 on r2.id = ur2.role_id and r2.delete_flag = 0 where ur2.delete_flag = 0 group by ur2.user_id ) ) max_role on max_role.user_id = u.id left join osh_user_asset a on a.user_id = u.id
and (max_role.level is null or max_role.level < #{maxLevel})
and u.username like concat('%', #{query.username}, '%')
and u.email like concat('%', #{query.email}, '%')
and max_role.role_id = #{query.roleId}
and u.status = 1
and u.status = 0
and u.delete_flag = 1
and u.delete_flag = 0
order by IFNULL(a.points, 0) ascdesc
order by u.violation_count ascdesc
order by u.create_time ascdesc

select u.id, u.username, u.email, u.avatar, u.sex, u.introduction, u.status, u.violation_count as violationCount, u.invite_code as inviteCode, u.delete_flag as deleteFlag, u.create_time as createTime, max_role.role_name as roleName, max_role.role_code as roleCode, max_role.level as roleLevel, IFNULL(a.points, 0) as points from osh_user u left join ( select ur.user_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.level from osh_user_role ur join osh_role r on r.id = ur.role_id and r.delete_flag = 0 where ur.delete_flag = 0 and (ur.user_id, r.level) in ( select ur2.user_id, max(r2.level) from osh_user_role ur2 join osh_role r2 on r2.id = ur2.role_id and r2.delete_flag = 0 where ur2.delete_flag = 0 group by ur2.user_id ) ) max_role on max_role.user_id = u.id left join osh_user_asset a on a.user_id = u.id where u.id = #{userId}

select id, user_id as userId, violation_type as violationType, reason, operator_id as operatorId, delete_flag as deleteFlag, create_time as createTime from osh_user_violation where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
select id as roleId, role_name as roleName, role_code as roleCode, level as roleLevel from osh_role where delete_flag = 0 and status = 1 and level <= #{maxLevel} order by level asc
mapper.update: update osh_user_role set delete_flag = 1 where user_id = #{userId} and role_id = #{roleId} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.select: select role_id from osh_user_role where user_id = #{userId} and delete_flag = 0
